ddls:
CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the school district */,
  "district_address" TEXT /* Full address of the district */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the district is located */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the district is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the district */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the districts table */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "school_address" TEXT /* Full address of the school */,
  "lead_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the employees table (school lead) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the school is located */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the school is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the school */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the school */,
  "school_email" TEXT /* Email address of the school */,
  "school_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the school */,
  "school_website" TEXT /* Website of the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the schools table */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Name of the employee */,
  "employee_title" TEXT /* Title of the employee (lead/principal, teacher, staff) */,
  "employee_email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "employee_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was administered */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test (e.g., math, science, language arts) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the schools table */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the tests table */,
  "median_result" REAL /* Median result for the test at the school */,
  "max_result" REAL /* Maximum result for the test at the school */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the test results */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test result (e.g., tested, not tested) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, researcher, principal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the districts table */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the schools table */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the tests table */,
  "can_view" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the user can view the data */,
  "can_edit" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the user can edit the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics data point */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the reports table */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., average test score) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id")
)
